$doc: RENDERED from core/policy/policy-data.json into Claude Code's vocabulary + hook registration. Merged into ~/.claude/settings.json by bin/leos-merge.py (never symlinked — Claude Code rewrites settings.json). permissions.deny = enforced secret-read guard; permissions.allow ships the 'universal' git/gh set only — setup appends the machine's package-manager allow (machine-local). Hook wrappers are FAIL-CLOSED: a missing/dangling script exits 2 (blocks) instead of silently passing.

hooks.command: sh -c 'S="$HOME"/.claude/hooks/bash-guard.py; [ -f "$S" ] || exit 2; python3 "$S"; ec=$?; [ "$ec" = 43 ] && exit 2; exit 0'
sh -c 'S="$HOME"/.claude/hooks/format-on-edit.py; [ -f "$S" ] || exit 0; python3 "$S"; ec=$?; [ "$ec" = 44 ] && exit 2; exit 0'
sh -c 'S="$HOME"/.claude/council/bin/council.py; [ -f "$S" ] || exit 0; python3 "$S" hook; ec=$?; [ "$ec" = 42 ] && exit 2; exit 0'
